description_long: This is a rectangular fence section composed of seven vertical white slats evenly spaced and supported by two horizontal tan rails on the back. The vertical slats are flat and rectangular, with their tops forming an alternating height pattern, giving the fence a slightly staggered appearance along the upper edge. The two side posts are thicker and tan in color, providing structural support and stability. The front face of the fence is clean and simple, with no visible decorative elements or hardware. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban or residential environments such as gardens, parks, or property boundaries. The materials appear to be painted or coated wood or composite, with a smooth, hard finish.
description: A modern fence section with seven white vertical slats and tan horizontal rails, featuring an alternating height top edge and a clean, simple design.
description_view_0: Front view showing seven white vertical slats with an alternating height top edge and tan side posts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the slats and the depth of the tan posts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two tan horizontal rails connecting the slats and posts, with the staggered top edge visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same thin profile and structural depth as the other side.
